text:
Created attachment 253777
multimedia/py-plexapi

py-plexapi provides unofficial Python bindings for the Plex API, aiming
to replicate the capabilities of the official Plex Web Client. It allows
users to navigate and manage local or remote Plex libraries, control media
playback on connected devices, and listen for server notifications.

https://github.com/pkkid/python-plexapi
